id.description: A UUID string identifying this logs alert configuration.

slack_channel_id.description: Slack channel ID. Required when type=slack.

slack_workspace_id.description: Integration ID for the Slack workspace. Required when type=slack.

type.description:
Destination type — slack or webhook.

* `slack` - slack
* `webhook` - webhook

webhook_url.description: HTTPS endpoint to POST to. Required when type=webhook.
